compressed_prompt: create ad template for portable camera, highlight key points with <4 caps, min 10 sentences
response:
CAPTURE ANYWHERE. ANYTIME.

UNLEASH YOUR CREATIVITY with this ultra-portable powerhouse.

LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN fits in any bag, ready for spontaneous adventures.

INSTANT SETUP means you never miss the perfect shot.

PRO-GRADE IMAGE QUALITY delivers stunning clarity and color.

BUILT TO ENDURE tough conditions, from city streets to mountain trails.

LONG-LASTING BATTERY keeps you shooting all day and night.

SEAMLESS CONNECTIVITY for instant sharing to your devices.

INTUITIVE CONTROLS make professional results simple and fast.

VERSATILE MOUNTING works with tripods, grips, or even your hand.

YOUR STORY DESERVES TO BE TOLD. START CAPTURING IT NOW.
